description: NFKC conformance oracle for the pinned Unicode 16.0.0 normalizer. Every pair replays source -> NFKC(source); sample_assigned / sample_unassigned drive the assigned-at-16.0 guard tests.
license: Derived from NormalizationTest.txt of the Unicode Character Database 16.0.0, copyright (c) 2024 Unicode, Inc., used under the UNICODE LICENSE V3 (https://www.unicode.org/license.txt).
pair_encoding: <source>;<nfkc>|<parts> where <source> and <nfkc> are space-joined uppercase-hex code points (min 4 digits) and <parts> are the space-joined NormalizationTest @Part numbers the pair derives from
